name: Like A Girl – Legs Opening

reformer.startPosition: Saying on reformer supine, toes on footbar

movements.lyric: Find me up in magic city

movements.movement: (V position) Toes on footbar, heels together, open carriage

movements.lyric: Find me up in magic city
If you fight like a girl
movements.movement: Toes on edges of footbar (2nd position externally rotated), open carriage
movements.transitionCue: Reformers wide feet, barre sumo press

movements.lyric: Find me up in magic city

barre.startPosition: Standing, heels up and against box

movements.movement: Squats with heels up, dumbbells on shoulders

movements.lyric: Find me up in magic city

movements.movement: Plié in v-position with heels up, dumbbells from hip to shoulder height

movements.lyric: Find me up in magic city
If you fight like a girl
movements.movement: Sumo squat w/ dumbbells shoulder press

movements.lyric: Find me up in magic city

cues: Erro comum: permitir que os joelhos caiam para dentro durante a abertura - cue 'keep knees tracking over toes'. Muitos alunos fazem o movimento muito rápido perdendo controle - enfatizar 'slow and controlled opening, resist the spring'. Atenção para não arquear as costas excessivamente - lembrar 'maintain neutral spine, engage your core'.
introCue: Set up on the reformer lying supine with toes on the footbar and 2 red 1 blue springs, or grab your 2kg dumbbells standing in front of the reformer with heels up against the box. We're opening with parallel squats - toes on footbar opening carriage on reformer or squats with dumbbells on shoulders at barre - then we pulse and hold. Next we move to V-position with heels together on reformer or plié with heels together and against the box, dumbbells going from hip to shoulder height, pulse and hold again. Finally we take toes to edges of footbar in 2nd position on reformer or sumo squats with shoulder press, finishing with our final pulse and hold. Let's fire up those legs and open with power.

name: Sports Car – Glute Bridge

movements.lyric: In the alley in the back
movements.movement: Hold up – open knees and pulse
movements.transitionCue: stay up — and open the knees

movements.movement: Hold up – open and close carriage
movements.transitionCue: keep hips up — reformer: open the carriage / mat: one leg up then the other

movements.movement: One leg to tabletop, hold bridge up, open and close carriage (with single leg)
movements.transitionCue: stay up — Reformer: lift leg to tabletop open and close; Barre: single-leg bridge up down

movements.lyric: On the corner on the bench

movements.movement: Other leg to tabletop, hold bridge up, open and close carriage (with single leg)

barre.startPosition: Lying supine on mat, heels up

movements.lyric: In the alley in the back
movements.movement: Hold up – open knees and pulse
Hold bridge up – one leg lifts to tabletop at a time
One leg to tabletop – single-leg bridge up down

movements.lyric: On the corner on the bench

movements.movement: Other leg to tabletop – single-leg bridge up down

cues: Knees aligned with second toe throughout. Cue: 'pressiona o calcanhar contra o footbar como se quisesses afastá-lo'. Single-leg extension challenges balance.
introCue: Set up on the reformer lying supine with heels on the footbar and 1 red plus band springs, with the band around your knees, or on the mat with ankle weights and band around knees, lying supine with heels up. We're starting with glute bridge - reformer: heels on footbar; mat: heels up. Then we hold the bridge up and pulse the knees open. Next we stay up - reformer: open close the carriage; mat: lift one leg to tabletop at a time. Then we take one leg to tabletop and hold bridge up - reformer: opening closing carriage; mat: single leg tabletop up down, followed by pulses. We switch to the other leg for tabletop, hold up - reformer: open close carriage; mat: other leg tabletop up down, finishing with final pulses. Let's fire up those glutes and get moving.

movements.movement: Crunch hold – extend one leg at a time

movements.lyric: I hit her phone with the tea

That my best friend if you need a freak

movements.lyric: That my best friend, she a real bad bitch

movements.lyric: You the baddest and you know it

cues: Keep the lower back imprinted. Cue: 'sente o umbigo a afastar-se do chão'. Cabeça apoiada nas mãos se o pescoço cansar.
song: Best Friend – Saweetie ft. Doja Cat
introCue: Set up on the reformer with 1 red spring, hands in straps, lying supine hands pointing towards the ceiling, or on mat lying supine with hands behind head. We're starting with legs in tabletop position for crunches. Then we hold the crunch and extend one leg at a time, followed by pulses. After a brief pause, we move to legs tabletop and one foot touches the floor keeping 90 degree - reformer: hands next to hips with carriage open, trying to touch floor. Next we crunch with legs extending to 45 degrees and back to tabletop. We finish holding the crunch with legs extended. Let's work that core!

name: Woman – Lunge & Skates

reformer.startPosition: Standing, one foot in platform extender the other against box with heel up

barre.startPosition: Standing, elastic behind front foot, slider beneath back foot

movements.movement: Lunge right – arms lift with elastic when going down
Lunge left – arms lift with elastic when going down

cues: Erro comum: permitir que o joelho da frente ultrapasse os dedos do pé no lunge - manter o joelho alinhado sobre o tornozelo. No skates, evitar inclinar demais o tronco para a frente - manter o core ativado e coluna neutra. Usar o comando 'press down through your heel' para ativação correta dos glúteos.
introCue:
Set up on the reformer with 1 red spring and short box, standing with one feet on carriage extender and the other against the box, or at barre standing with elastic below front foot and slider underneath back foot

We're starting with lunges - reformer: pressing the carriage out and in; barre: sliding forward and back with arms lifting with the elastic when going down. Then we move to skates - fron knee stays flexed and back leg flexes, We repeat the lunges with other leg, then finish with more skates. Let's work those legs and glutes!

name: Bad Girls – Plank Series

reformer.startPosition: Forearm on box, knees down, feet on platform extender

movements.transitionCue: Reformer open and close to plank, barre add slider knee pulls.
Reformer keep going; barre switch to other foot chest.
Keep your plank strong, now pike up to the sky.
Open to plank, rock hips side to side

movements.movement: Plank hold, pulse to one side
Plank hold, pulse to other side
Plank hold, pulse to one side
Plank hold, pulse to other side

cues: Common errors: allowing hips to sag in plank, rushing transitions without control, placing too much weight on shoulders. Verbal cues: 'Mantenham o core ativo durante toda a série', 'Transições lentas e controladas', 'Ombros afastados das orelhas'.
introCue:
Set up on the reformer with 1 blue spring and short box, forearms on box with knees down and feet on platform extender, or at barre in bear hold position with slider nearby.

We're starting with bear hold - reformer: holding position on box; barre: bear hold on floor. Then bear to plank transitions - reformer: moving from bear to plank by opening carriage; barre: plank and bring one foot to chest using slider (then switch leg). We hold plank, then move to plank to pike - reformer: closing carriage with legs straight; barre: same movement. After a quick rest, we finish with plank hold side to side and pulses - reformer: shifting weight side to side in plank; barre: same lateral movement. Let's fire up that core!

name: Yo Perreo Sola – Upper Body

reformer.props: Hands in straps, short box facing back
reformer.startPosition: Seated on short box facing back

movements.transitionCue: open the arms and close at shoulder height
bring it to a shoulder press
hands next to hips and extend to the back
hands next to hips and extend to the front
arms from hip to side open to above head

cues: Manter o sumo squat durante toda a série no barre — costas direitas, joelhos abertos. Reformer: omoplatas para baixo e para trás durante o curl. Cue: 'as omoplatas deslizam para os bolsos das calças'.
introCue:
Set up on the reformer with 1 blue 1 white springs, hands in straps, short box facing back - seated on box facing back. At barre, grab your dumbbells and hold sumo squat position.

We're starting with bicep curls - reformer: pulling straps up; barre: curling dumbbells in sumo squat. Then open arms - reformer: opening straps wide; barre: opening arms wide. Next bicep curl with open arms - reformer: combining both movements; barre: same combination. Then shoulder press - reformer: pressing straps overhead; barre: pressing dumbbells up. Moving to triceps - reformer: extending straps back; barre: tricep extensions. We hold the position, then offering - reformer: offering straps forward; barre: offering dumbbells. We finish with hug moon overhead - reformer: hugging straps over head; barre: same movement with dumbbells. Let's work that upper body!

name: Bootylicious – Side-Lying Hip

reformer.startPosition: Side-lying, strap in knee crease, knees together

movements.transitionCue: Reformer pulse open, barre pulse that leg up!

movements.movement: Extend leg to footbar and bring back
movements.transitionCue: Reformer extend leg out above footbar, barre bend and straighten knee keeping leg up
Reformer switch sides, barre keep leg up and bend knee
Reformer open knees, barre left leg up down
Reformer pulse open, barre pulse that leg up!

movements.movement: Extend leg to footbar and bring back
movements.transitionCue: Reformer extend leg to footbar, barre extend and flex knee
Reformer rest, barre keep leg up and bend knee.

barre.startPosition: Standing, hands in hips, torso hinging forward, front leg with heel on block, back leg with toes touching floor

movements.movement: Right leg goes up and down
Leg stays up, extend and flex knee
Leg stays up, extend and flex knee

cues: Pelvis must not rotate back when knee opens. Cue: 'as ancas ficam empilhadas uma sobre a outra'. Barre: supporting leg slightly soft, never locked.
introCue:
Set up on the reformer with 1 blue 1 white springs, strap in knee crease, side-lying with knees together. At barre, standing with hands on hips, torso hinging forward, front leg heel on block, back leg toes touching floor.

Reformer: opening top knee against strap; barre: right leg goes up and down behind you. Then pulses - reformer: pulsing knee open; barre: pulsing leg up. Next, reformer: extend leg straight to footbar and back bending knee, barre: leg stays up behind you, extend and flex knee. Reformer: flip to other side; while barre: pulse with knee bent. Same sequence on second side. Let's work those hips and glutes!

Set up on the reformer with 2 red and 1 blue springs, heels on footbar in parallel position.

We're starting in parallel - press out and in with control. Then we move to first position - heels together, toes apart. Next, second position - wide legs, toes turned out. Back to first position, then finish in parallel. Focus on controlled movement and strong leg connection throughout. Let's work those legs!
name: Second Position

reformer.startPosition: Toes on footbar, other leg table top

movements.movement: Igual a levantar cabeça e peito

name: Round back + footwork on box warm up

movements.movement: Heels together toes apart on box + lift arm
Second position toes on box + twist

introCue:
Set up on the reformer with 1 blue and 1 white springs, hands in straps, facing the back of the reformer with legs straight out in front of you.

This back rowing series is all about strengthening your posterior chain - your upper back, rear delts, and deep postural muscles. We'll be working through different arm patterns that challenge your back extensors while maintaining core stability. Think about creating length through your spine as you work against the spring resistance. This is fantastic for counteracting forward head posture and rounded shoulders. Focus on quality movement and really feel those back muscles firing. Let's build some beautiful posture!
name: Back rowing preps

reformer.startPosition: Facing back of reformer, legs straight

movements.movement: Hip lift (2cm from carriage + open and close)
Hip roll (full bridge + open and close)
Abduction (open arms from hips to side)
Abdution w/ squat (open arms from hips to front)
